ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research grant */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the grant */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the grant period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the grant period */,
  "matchingscore" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the grant to a user's query or profile */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution receiving the grant */,
  "amount_awarded" TEXT /* Amount awarded for the grant */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency sponsoring the grant */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., research, fellowship, etc.) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the grant recipient */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the recipient is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the recipient */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_recipients" (
  "grant_recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant-recipient association */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the recipient in the grant (e.g., PI, Co-PI, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_recipients_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_recipients_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant application */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant for which the application is submitted */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant researcher */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, awarded, rejected) */,
  "application_title" TEXT /* Title of the application */,
  "application_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the researcher is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant application being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the application */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES grant_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the reviewer is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the reviewer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword describing the grant */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant associated with the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_keywords_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborator */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant that funded the research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_types" (
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant type */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., research, fellowship, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_type_id")
)
